questions.question: Why does combining multiple weak classifiers into an ensemble improve accuracy?
questions.questionZh: 为什么将多个弱分类器（weak classifier）组合成集成（ensemble）能够提高准确率（accuracy）？
options: Each weak classifier memorizes a different part of the test set
If the classifiers make different errors, majority voting cancels out individual mistakes
Ensembles always use more training data than single models
Weak classifiers are always faster than strong classifiers
optionsZh: 每个弱分类器（weak classifier）会记忆测试集（test set）的不同部分。
若各分类器 (classifiers) 的错误互不相同，多数投票 (majority voting) 即可抵消单个模型的错误。
集成模型（Ensembles）使用的训练数据（Training Data）总是多于单一模型（Single Models）。
弱分类器（Weak Classifier）的运行速度始终快于强分类器（Strong Classifier）。
questions.explanation: The key is diversity. If classifiers make independent errors, majority voting means a wrong answer must fool more than half the models. Errors cancel out, and the ensemble accuracy exceeds any individual.
questions.explanationZh: 关键在于多样性（Diversity）。如果分类器（Classifiers）产生的错误相互独立，那么多数投票（Majority Voting）机制意味着，一个错误的答案必须同时误导超过半数的模型。这些错误会相互抵消，从而使集成（Ensemble）的准确率超过其中任何一个单独的模型。

questions.question: What is the main difference between bagging and boosting?
questions.questionZh: 装袋法（Bagging）与提升法（Boosting）的主要区别是什么？
options: Bagging trains models in parallel on random subsets; boosting trains models sequentially, focusing on previous errors
Bagging uses deep neural networks; boosting uses decision trees
Bagging reduces bias; boosting reduces variance
Bagging requires labeled data; boosting works unsupervised
optionsZh: 装袋法（Bagging）在随机子集上并行训练模型；提升法（Boosting）则按顺序训练模型，并专注于修正先前的错误。
装袋法（Bagging）使用深度神经网络（Deep Neural Networks）；提升法（Boosting）使用决策树（Decision Trees）。
装袋法（Bagging）降低偏差（Bias）；提升法（Boosting）降低方差（Variance）。
装袋法 (Bagging) 需要标注数据 (Labeled Data)；提升法 (Boosting) 可在无监督 (Unsupervised) 模式下工作。
questions.explanation: Bagging trains models independently on bootstrap samples (parallel, reduces variance). Boosting trains models sequentially, with each new model focusing on the mistakes of the ensemble so far (reduces bias).
questions.explanationZh: 装袋法（Bagging）在自助采样样本（bootstrap samples）上独立训练模型（并行，降低方差（variance））。提升法（Boosting）则按顺序训练模型，每个新模型都专注于修正当前集成模型（ensemble）此前的错误（降低偏差（bias））。

questions.question: In AdaBoost, what happens to the sample weight of a misclassified training point after each round?
questions.questionZh: 在自适应提升算法 (AdaBoost) 中，每一轮迭代后，被错误分类的训练样本的权重会发生怎样的变化？
options: It stays the same
It increases, so the next weak learner focuses more on this hard example
It decreases, so the next learner ignores it
It is removed from the training set
optionsZh: 保持不变
其权重会增加，因此下一个弱学习器（weak learner）将更加关注该困难样本（hard example）。
其值会下降，因此下一个学习器（learner）将忽略它。
它将从训练集 (training set) 中移除。
questions.explanation: AdaBoost increases the weights of misclassified samples after each round. This forces the next weak learner to pay more attention to the examples the ensemble currently gets wrong.
questions.explanationZh: AdaBoost 会在每一轮结束后增加误分类样本 (misclassified samples) 的权重 (weights)。这会促使下一个弱学习器 (weak learner) 更加关注当前集成模型 (ensemble) 预测错误的样本。

questions.question: A random forest with 100 trees has the same test accuracy as 200 trees. Adding more trees to 500 also shows no improvement. Why?
questions.questionZh: 包含 100 棵树的随机森林 (Random Forest) 与包含 200 棵树的模型具有相同的测试准确率 (Test Accuracy)。将树的数量增加到 500 棵也未带来任何性能提升。这是为什么？
options: The random forest is underfitting and needs a different algorithm
After enough trees, variance reduction plateaus and adding more trees provides diminishing returns without increasing overfitting
500 trees is the maximum allowed
The trees are all identical so adding more has no effect
optionsZh: 随机森林 (Random Forest) 出现了欠拟合 (Underfitting) 现象，需要更换其他算法。
当决策树（Decision Trees）的数量达到一定规模后，方差降低（Variance Reduction）的效果会趋于平稳；此时继续增加树的数量只会带来边际效益递减，而不会加剧过拟合（Overfitting）。
最多允许 500 棵树 (Trees)。
由于所有决策树 (Decision Trees) 都完全相同，因此增加更多的树不会产生任何效果。
questions.explanation: Random forests do not overfit with more trees (unlike boosting). However, variance reduction plateaus once enough diverse trees have been averaged. More trees just add compute cost without improving accuracy.
questions.explanationZh: 随机森林 (Random Forests) 不会随着树数量的增加而过拟合 (overfitting)（这与提升方法 (Boosting) 不同）。然而，当对足够多具有多样性的树进行平均后，方差缩减 (variance reduction) 的效果便会趋于平稳。继续增加树的数量只会徒增计算成本，而无法进一步提升模型准确率。

questions.question: Gradient boosting fits each new tree to what quantity?
questions.questionZh: 梯度提升（Gradient Boosting）将每棵新树拟合到什么量上？
options: The original target values
The residuals (errors) of the current ensemble's predictions
Random subsets of features
The predictions of the previous tree
optionsZh: 原始目标值 (target values)
当前集成模型（ensemble）预测的残差（residuals）（误差（errors））
随机特征子集 (Random Subsets of Features)
前一棵树的预测结果。
questions.explanation: In gradient boosting, each new tree is trained to predict the residuals (negative gradient of the loss) of the current ensemble. This sequentially reduces the remaining error.
questions.explanationZh: 在梯度提升 (Gradient Boosting) 中，每棵新树都会被训练以预测当前集成模型 (Ensemble) 的残差 (Residuals)（即损失 (Loss) 的负梯度）。这一过程会逐步降低剩余误差。
